## Entities.MoldsLibrary.createAsync() method

Creates a new MoldsLibrary instance asynchronously with encryption support.

Use this factory method when you need to decrypt encrypted collections. Pass encryption config via `params.encryption`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static createAsync(params?: IMoldsLibraryAsyncParams): Promise<Result<MoldsLibrary>>;
```
